summary: Completed TASK-148 (P0): Designed dashboard UI for workflow list, create, and usage stats. Created design tokens (dashboard.json), CSS custom properties (dashboard-variables.css), Tailwind theme extensions (dashboard-theme.ts), and full component spec (dashboard-ui-spec.md). Covers layout, workflow cards/list, status badges, stat cards, usage progress bar, search/filter toolbar, empty state, and upgrade prompt.
